stories.title: Ohtani for MVP -- and Cy Young? Early rankings for...
stories.summary: With Memorial Day weekend behind us, it's time to take our first look at the leaders for MVP, Cy Young and more.

stories.title: How Pokémon became your favorite MLB player's favo...
stories.summary: Inside clubhouses, MLB's biggest stars are trading cards hoping for rare finds just like collectors everywhere.

stories.title: PGA of America president out after Cup gaffes
stories.summary: Don Rea Jr., who came under fire after his delayed response to unruly fan behavior directed at the European Ryder Cup team, is out as president of the PGA of America.

stories.title: Flores' discrimination suit vs. NFL can go to tria...
stories.summary: The Supreme Court refused to intervene in a discrimination lawsuit led by former Dolphins coach Brian Flores against the NFL, allowing the case to proceed toward trial. The NFL had hoped to handle the case through its own arbitration process.

stories.title: Fernandez, star on '72 undefeated Dolphins, dies
stories.summary: Manny Fernandez, a two-time Super Bowl-winning defensive lineman with the Dolphins, has died at age 79.
